Class AITUI

java.lang.Object
views.Client.AITUI
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClientView
public class AITUI extends Object implements ClientView
AI Interface that hooks into GameClient to play automatically. It detects when it's the AI's turn and triggers moves.

      Specified by:

      Parameters:
      player1 - name of first player
      player2 - name of second player
      iAmFirst - true if this client moves first

      public void showGameOver(String reason, String winner)
      Description copied from interface: ClientView
      Called when the game ends.
      Specified by:
      showGameOver in interface ClientView
      Parameters:
      reason - the reason (VICTORY, DRAW, DISCONNECT)
      winner - the winner's name, or null for draw/disconnect
